conservative.name: Flames of Purity
conservative.requirements: 5 favour. Target must be willing and engaged with you. You must use a prepare maneuver before invoking this blessing

success.description: Fire crackles up to surround your target; the blessing is invoked
As above, and add 2 recharge tokens to this action

chaosStar.description: Each time this blessing prevents corruption, the affected target suffers 1 normal wound as the flames flare white-hot.

sigmarsComet.description: You are also protected by this blessing

reckless.name: Flames of Purity
reckless.requirements: 5 favour. You must use a prepare manoeuvre before invoking this blessing

success.description: Fire crackles up to surround you; the blessing is invoked

chaosStar.description: Each time this blessing prevents corruption, you suffer 1 wound as the flames flare white-hot.

sigmarsComet.description: While this blessing is recharging, you gain +1 defense and +1 soak
